reviews.comment:
Pocas veces tiene cola considerando el punto neurálgico en que se encuentra,los playeros y los chicos del serviclub son muy atentos y amables y poseen información del tráfico local(dónde hay cortes o desvíos) de noche no tienen comida preparada como antes pero en caso de querer algo lo preparan en el momento

(Translated by Google)
There's rarely a queue considering its central location. The beach attendants and the service club staff are very attentive and friendly, and they have information about local traffic (where there are closures or detours). At night they don't have prepared food like before, but if you want something, they'll prepare it on the spot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlNzZ5bkhBEAE
